item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p10","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response immediately brakes the request, identifies the repeated prior pattern across stamp, tax rate, delivery date, and warranty, and reframes the issue as a missing unified pre-inquiry information baseline rather than another field. Although it allows a bounded emergency field, it explicitly prevents treating that as the long-term default and proposes upstream consolidation/redesign, so the core anti-spiral wakeup is present."}
